project: a daily generative art practice, after Zach Lieberman
batch_note: 008 — diez estudios de un partido · pick the ones that stay.

sketches.title: pool
sketches.note: Soft color-field blobs breathing into each other, pigment-style mixing on cream paper.

sketches.title: hills
sketches.note: Rolling noise terrain through an 8×8 Bayer matrix. One bit of ink; the machine pretends to be a printer.

sketches.title: misregistration
sketches.note: Two riso ink layers of warped stripes printed slightly off-register. The moiré is the drawing.

sketches.title: lenses
sketches.note: A quiet grid of dots disturbed by invisible glass. Three lenses wander the field.

sketches.title: plume
sketches.note: Particles ride a slowly turning noise field, drawing additive light. Long exposure of something that was never there.

sketches.title: wash
sketches.note: Translucent deformed circles settle on paper one at a time, like watercolor drying in layers.

sketches.title: taffy
sketches.note: Video feedback in software: the canvas redraws into itself, rotated and zoomed, while three lights orbit.

sketches.title: órbitas
sketches.note: The goal as gravity: 38 shots in orbit, on-target tighter, the five goals spiral in and ring the bell.

sketches.title: minutos
sketches.note: The match told only in type: 120 minutes tick by, goal numerals slam full-width and stack into the ledger.

sketches.title: sismógrafo
sketches.note: 120 stacked seismic traces, one per minute; shots tremble, goals spike off the chart.

sketches.title: transmisión
sketches.note: A chart-recorder scans the match's color signal into a degraded broadcast; goals leave hot scars.

sketches.title: bufanda
sketches.note: The match woven as a fan scarf: weft rows by minute, goals as pulled threads, cards as gold yarn.

sketches.title: interferencia
sketches.note: Two wave systems — frequency by shots, amplitude by possession — engrave an interference field; goals scar the phase.

sketches.title: terreno
sketches.note: A topographic paper relief of match pressure: shots as hills, goals as mountains, contours in ink.

sketches.title: constelación
sketches.note: All 38 shots as stars on a vertical time axis; the five goals burn brightest, the own goal wears a hollow halo.
Every person in the stadium, one gpu point each — 64,478 souls leaning with the match; goals ripple through the crowd.

sketches.title: río
sketches.note: Two risograph inks share one page; the boundary is the real balance of the game, goals bend the river.
